_comment: Tier-1 mcp_tool source presets for container-manager-mcp (AU-KG.ingest.mcp-tool-connector). Declarative sync of the Docker/Podman inventory into the KG via the container-manager-mcp MCP server. For full typed-node ingestion (containers/images/volumes/networks/services/nodes + :usesImage/:runsOn links) call the cm_ingest_inventory tool instead. Contributed presets win over the central MCP_TOOL_PRESETS.
